content: There are three files available for this experiment: a single-cell count matrix in Matrix Market Exchange format, a cell barcode with a single barcode in each line and a table containing genes ID and related gene name. In this analysis what is necessary is to have identify cell clusters using the Louvain algorithm and provide visualizations including UMPA plots colored by clusters and marker genes. Find the appropriate way to perform this analysis using Galaxy material available and its tools. Use barcodes.tsv, genes.tsv, matrix.mtx. Use concise task language and assume domain familiarity. Prefer this guidance when available: single-cell RNA-seq analysis. Return structured outputs for normalization_tool, workflow_step_count, marker_genes.
